name: @nuqtaplus/frontend
description: نقطة بلس - نظام إدارة نقاط البيع والمخازن
author: NuqtaPlus Team

scripts.build:server: cross-env NODE_ENV=production VITE_TARGET=electron NUQTA_APP_MODE=server vite build && electron-builder --win
scripts.build:client: cross-env NODE_ENV=production VITE_TARGET=electron NUQTA_APP_MODE=client vite build && electron-builder --win --config electron-builder-client.yml
scripts.build:win: cross-env NODE_ENV=production VITE_TARGET=electron NUQTA_APP_MODE=server vite build && electron-builder --win
scripts.publish:win: cross-env VITE_TARGET=electron NODE_ENV=production NUQTA_APP_MODE=server vite build && electron-builder --win --publish always
